1243587070889035054.en_us: Shanna, of the Savage Land - though these days I barely recognize my own home. Something ripped these dinosaurs right out of the jungle and dropped them in your city.

4590350391093101872.en_us: Sauron, dimensional storms, plain old bad luck - I've heard every theory, and none explain how I ended up in Manhattan chasing my own dinosaurs.

5525436076480529714.en_us: Whatever the cause, they're your problem now too. Go on - show them who really rules this jungle.
